### Renamed teams

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2000%E2%80%9301_Divizia_C&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Renamed teams")]

*Vrancart Adjud* was renamed as [Romstrans Adjud](/w/index.php?title=Vrancart_Adjud&action=edit&redlink=1 "Vrancart Adjud (page does not exist)").

*Termoutilaj Piatra Neamț* was renamed as [Ceahlăul Piatra Neamț II](/wiki/CSM_Ceahl%C4%83ul_II_Piatra_Neam%C8%9B "CSM Ceahlăul II Piatra Neamț").

*Fortus Iași* was renamed as [Unirea 2000 Iași](/w/index.php?title=Fortus_Ia%C8%99i&action=edit&redlink=1 "Fortus Iași (page does not exist)").

*Electrica Constanța* was renamed as [Electrica Dobrogea Constanța](/wiki/Electrica_Constan%C8%9Ba "Electrica Constanța").

*Agricultorul Gârbovi* was renamed as [Dinamo Agricultorul Gârbovi](/w/index.php?title=Agricultorul_G%C3%A2rbovi&action=edit&redlink=1 "Agricultorul Gârbovi (page does not exist)").

*Robema Roșiori* was renamed as [Bere Roșiori](/w/index.php?title=Robema_Ro%C8%99iori&action=edit&redlink=1 "Robema Roșiori (page does not exist)").

*Agricultorul Urziceni* was renamed as [Unirea Urziceni](/wiki/FC_Unirea_Urziceni "FC Unirea Urziceni").

*Rova Roșiori* was renamed as [Municipal Roșiori](/w/index.php?title=Rova_Ro%C8%99iori&action=edit&redlink=1 "Rova Roșiori (page does not exist)").

*Minerul Horezu* was renamed as [Prelcon Horezu](/wiki/Minerul_Horezu "Minerul Horezu").

*Laminorul Beclean* was renamed as [Someș Gaz Beclean](/w/index.php?title=Laminorul_Beclean&action=edit&redlink=1 "Laminorul Beclean (page does not exist)").

*Progresul Șomcuta Mare* was renamed as [Liber Humana Șomcuta Mare](/wiki/Progresul_%C8%98omcuta_Mare "Progresul Șomcuta Mare").

### Other changes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2000%E2%80%9301_Divizia_C&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Other changes")]

[Hondor Agigea](/w/index.php?title=Hondor_Agigea&action=edit&redlink=1 "Hondor Agigea (page does not exist)") promoted to Liga II but due to financial problems sold its place to [Metalul Plopeni](/wiki/Metalul_Plopeni "Metalul Plopeni").

Pro Mobila Vatra Dornei was moved from [Vatra Dornei](/wiki/Vatra_Dornei "Vatra Dornei") to [Crucea](/wiki/Crucea,_Suceava "Crucea, Suceava") and was renamed as [Pro Mobila Crucea](/w/index.php?title=Dorna_Vatra_Dornei&action=edit&redlink=1 "Dorna Vatra Dornei (page does not exist)").

[CSȘ Târgu Neamț](/w/index.php?title=CS%C8%98_T%C3%A2rgu_Neam%C8%9B&action=edit&redlink=1 "CSȘ Târgu Neamț (page does not exist)") ceded its place to [Silvex Târgu Neamț](/w/index.php?title=CS_Silvex_T%C3%A2rgu_Neam%C8%9B&action=edit&redlink=1 "CS Silvex Târgu Neamț (page does not exist)").

[Telecom Iași](/w/index.php?title=Telecom_Ia%C8%99i&action=edit&redlink=1 "Telecom Iași (page does not exist)") bought the place of [Viitorul Pașcani](/w/index.php?title=Viitorul_Pa%C8%99cani&action=edit&redlink=1 "Viitorul Pașcani (page does not exist)").

[Aromet Poșta Câlnau](/w/index.php?title=Aromet_Po%C8%99ta_C%C3%A2lnau&action=edit&redlink=1 "Aromet Poșta Câlnau (page does not exist)") ceded its place to [Olimpia Râmnicu Sărat](/wiki/CSM_R%C3%A2mnicu_S%C4%83rat "CSM Râmnicu Sărat").

[Juventus Bascov](/w/index.php?title=Juventus_Bascov&action=edit&redlink=1 "Juventus Bascov (page does not exist)") ceded its place to [Internațional Pitești](/wiki/FC_Interna%C8%9Bional_Curtea_de_Arge%C8%99 "FC Internațional Curtea de Argeș").

[Energia Feldioara](/w/index.php?title=Energia_Feldioara&action=edit&redlink=1 "Energia Feldioara (page does not exist)") took the place of [Unirea Cristuru Secuiesc](/w/index.php?title=Unirea_Cristuru_Secuiesc&action=edit&redlink=1 "Unirea Cristuru Secuiesc (page does not exist)").

[Gilortul Târgu Cărbunești](/wiki/Gilortul_T%C3%A2rgu_C%C4%83rbune%C8%99ti "Gilortul Târgu Cărbunești") bought the place of [Cozia Călimănești](/w/index.php?title=Cozia_C%C4%83lim%C4%83ne%C8%99ti&action=edit&redlink=1 "Cozia Călimănești (page does not exist)").

[Motorul Astra Arad](/w/index.php?title=Motorul_Astra_Arad&action=edit&redlink=1 "Motorul Astra Arad (page does not exist)") merged with [Universitatea Arad](/wiki/CS_ACU_Arad "CS ACU Arad"), the first one being absorbed by the second one. The new entity was renamed as [ACU Astra Trinity Arad](/wiki/CS_ACU_Arad "CS ACU Arad").

[Zimbrul Siret](/w/index.php?title=Zimbrul_Siret&action=edit&redlink=1 "Zimbrul Siret (page does not exist)"), [Spicul Afumați](/wiki/CS_Afuma%C8%9Bi "CS Afumați"), [Viitorul Costache Negri](/w/index.php?title=Viitorul_Costache_Negri&action=edit&redlink=1 "Viitorul Costache Negri (page does not exist)"), [Aversa București](/w/index.php?title=Aversa_Bucure%C8%99ti&action=edit&redlink=1 "Aversa București (page does not exist)"), [Chimia Zalău](/w/index.php?title=Chimia_Zal%C4%83u&action=edit&redlink=1 "Chimia Zalău (page does not exist)"), [Voința Beștepe](/w/index.php?title=Voin%C8%9Ba_Be%C8%99tepe&action=edit&redlink=1 "Voința Beștepe (page does not exist)"), [Vipp Bârlad](/w/index.php?title=Vipp_B%C3%A2rlad&action=edit&redlink=1 "Vipp Bârlad (page does not exist)"), [Steaua Focșani](/w/index.php?title=Steaua_Foc%C8%99ani&action=edit&redlink=1 "Steaua Focșani (page does not exist)") and [Forestierul Stâlpeni](/w/index.php?title=Forestierul_St%C3%A2lpeni&action=edit&redlink=1 "Forestierul Stâlpeni (page does not exist)") withdrew.

[Foresta Fălticeni II](/wiki/Foresta_F%C4%83lticeni "Foresta Fălticeni"), [AS Neptun](/w/index.php?title=AS_Neptun&action=edit&redlink=1 "AS Neptun (page does not exist)"), [Francesca Popești-Leordeni](/w/index.php?title=Francesca_Pope%C8%99ti-Leordeni&action=edit&redlink=1 "Francesca Popești-Leordeni (page does not exist)"), [Paulo BTA București](/w/index.php?title=CFR_BTA_Bucure%C8%99ti&action=edit&redlink=1 "CFR BTA București (page does not exist)") bought a place.
